untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (AEDT/Ascending Ending Diagonal Triangle) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. The specific pattern identification logic, gap size evaluation relative to market regime, and pullback probability assessment require visual pattern detection or multi-bar composite logic not available in the indicator set. Source text also contains incomplete parameter specifications (AUTHOR_SILENT on success rates, stop placement, target methodology).
translation_notes: Attempted to construct a SHORT entry based on price breaking pivot support with volume confirmation, and exit on pullback reversal (crossing back above pivot). Hold period set to 11 days per pullback completion average. Stop loss set conservatively at 3% given 28% average decline cited for bear market scenarios without pullbacks. However, the core AEDT pattern detection and gap-regime evaluation cannot be reliably translated without access to pattern recognition algorithms.
